lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manamukh mail na utarai jichar gur sabad na kare piaar |1|
lines.english: The filth of the self-willed manmukhs is not washed off; they have no love for the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kinai na paaeo kar vekhahu man veechaar |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one has found Him; reflect upon this in your mind and see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere satigur kai bhaanai chal |
lines.english: O my mind, walk in harmony with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਸੁਖ ਲਹਹਿ ਮਹਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vaseh amrit peeveh taa sukh laheh mehal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dwell within the home of your own inner being, and drink in the Ambrosial Nectar; you shall attain the Peace of the Mansion of His Presence. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਅਵਗਣਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sabad na jaanee avagan so prabh door |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know the Shabad; those without virtue are far removed from God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਗੁਣੁ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਬਹਣਿ ਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaugunavantee gun ko nahee behan na milai hadoor |
lines.english: The unvirtuous have no merit; they are not allowed to sit in His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਪਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee man bedhiaa prabh miliaa aap hadoor |2|
lines.english: Their minds are pierced through by the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and God Himself ushers them into His Presence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sach pachhaaniaa sach rate bharapoor |
lines.english: Those who recognize the True One are permeated and attuned to Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗਣਿ ਰੰਗਿਓਨੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਲਇਓਨੁ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape rangan rangion sabade leon milaae |
lines.english: He Himself dyes us in the Color of His Love; through the Word of His Shabad, He unites us with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa rang na utarai jo sach rate liv laae |
lines.english: This True Color shall not fade away, for those who are attuned to His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਭਵਿ ਥਕੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa bhav thake manamukh boojh na paae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs grow weary of wandering around in all four directions, but they do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis satigur mele so milai sachai sabad samaae |3|
lines.english: One who is united with the True Guru, meets and merges in the True Word of the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਘਣੇਰੇ ਕਰਿ ਥਕੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਾਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mitr ghanere kar thakee meraa dukh kaattai koe |
lines.english: I have grown weary of making so many friends, hoping that someone might be able to end my suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil preetam dukh kattiaa sabad milaavaa hoe |
lines.english: Meeting with my Beloved, my suffering has ended; I have attained Union with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖਟਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach khattanaa sach raas hai sache sachee soe |
lines.english: Earning Truth, and accumulating the Wealth of Truth, the truthful person gains a reputation of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੨੬॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: sach mile se na vichhurreh naanak guramukh hoe |4|26|59|
lines.english: Meeting with the True One, O Nanak, the Gurmukh shall not be separated from Him again. ||4||26||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਏਕੋ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh eko ik varatadaa alakh na lakhiaa jaae |
lines.english: The One and Only Lord is pervading and permeating all. The Unseen cannot be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape kaaran karataa kare srisatt dekhai aap upaae |
lines.english: The Creator Himself created the Creation; He produced the Universe, and He Himself watches over it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਦ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramatee sad man vasiaa sach rahe liv laae |1|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the True One dwells forever in the mind of those who remain lovingly attached to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape prabhoo deaal hai aape dee bujhaae |
lines.english: God Himself is Merciful; He Himself bestows understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere gur kee man lai rajaae |
lines.english: O my mind, surrender to the Guru's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸਭੁ ਥੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal sabh theeai naam vasai man aae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Mind and body are totally cooled and soothed, and the Naam comes to dwell in the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad pachhaaneeai jaa aape nadar karee |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is realized, when He Himself bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਸੋਈ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kar kaaran dhaariaa soee saar karee |
lines.english: Having created the creation, He supports it and takes care of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਆਪਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh sachai sabad rate aap mele karataar |2|
lines.english: -those Gurmukhs are attuned to the True Word of the Shabad; the Creator unites them with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਬਦੇ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: se jan sabade sohane tith sachai darabaar |
lines.english: Those who are beautifully adorned with the Shabad in the Court of the True Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਵਸੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt aape hukam vasai hukame kare beechaar |
lines.english: He dwells in each and every heart, by the Hukam of His Command; by His Hukam, we contemplate Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਣਾ ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee sach salaahanaa jis daa ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, praise the True One, who has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਅਵਗਣਵੰਤੀ ਰੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saa dhan naavai baaharee avaganavantee roe |3|
lines.english: That soul-bride who lacks the Lord's Name acts without virtue, and so she grieves. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee saalaaheeai haumai vichahu khoe |
lines.english: So praise Him through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and drive out egotism from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਾ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਕਢਾ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun veechaaree gun sangrahaa avagun kadtaa dhoe |
lines.english: Contemplating His Virtues, I accumulate virtue and merit; I wash myself clean of demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਲਗਾ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach salaahee sach lagaa sachai naae tripat hoe |
lines.english: Praising the True One, attached to the True One, I am satisfied with the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਿਦੂ ਪਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੨੭॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: naanak gur saalaahee aapanaa jidoo paaee prabh soe |4|27|60|
lines.english: O Nanak, I sing the Praises of my Guru; through Him, I find that God. ||4||27||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaaeidaa fir vechhorraa na hoe |
lines.english: He Himself unites us in His Union; there is no more separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਕਾਮ ਗਹੇਲੀਏ ਕਿਆ ਚਲਹਿ ਬਾਹ ਲੁਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun kaam gahelee kiaa chaleh baah luddaae |
lines.english: Listen, listen, O soul-bride: you are overtaken by sexual desire-why do you walk like that, swinging your arms in joy?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਸਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa pir na pachhaanahee kiaa muhu deseh jaae |
lines.english: You do not recognize your own Husband Lord! When you go to Him, what face will you show Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਜੈਸੀ ਥੀ ਰਹਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin hee jaisee thee rahaa satasangat mel milaae |1|
lines.english: If only I could be like them! Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, I am united in His Union. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਖਂ‍ੀ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sakhanee kant pachhaaniaa hau tin kai laagau paae |
lines.english: I touch the feet of my sister soul-brides who have known their Husband Lord.
